data.body:
[Triple Drop Campaign Preview]

The amount of rewards dropped in Missions will be tripled in celebration of the 0.5-Year Anniversary! 

🗓️Mission Normal*3: 5/23(Mon) 19:00 – 5/27 (Fri) 18:59 (UTC)
🗓️Mission Hard*3: 5/27(Fri) 19:00 – 5/30 (Mon) 18:59 (UTC)
